summary: Verified KB doc read-time chip fix on both target URLs. PECI doc (read_time=null) shows fallback '2 min read'; core-hcm doc shows persisted '25-30 min read' verbatim. Chip is adjacent to view-count chip, uses identical pill styling, and includes Clock icon. Hero contains no excerpt/summary paragraph. No console errors.
critical_code_review_comments: KBDoc.jsx is 603 lines — approaching the 700-line split threshold. Consider extracting Hero, TOC sidebar, and RightRail into separate components in a future refactor.

readTime useMemo fallback logic (200 wpm, ±2 min window) is sensible; only fires when doc.read_time is falsy so persisted DB values always win — verified with core-hcm doc showing '25-30 min read' verbatim.
context_for_next_testing_agent: KB doc pages tested at /knowledge-base/{slug}/{docId}. Chip testids: kb-view-count, kb-read-time. Hero testid: kb-doc-hero. Fallback readTime is computed client-side in KBDoc.jsx lines 83-93. Both target URLs verified passing on iteration 9.
